name: Dark Mode
description: Use a darker color palette across the app

name: Compact Layout
description: Reduce spacing and padding throughout the interface

name: Blur Effects
description: Enable translucent panels and background blur

name: Animated UI
description: Play smooth transitions and interface animations

name: Desktop Notifications
description: Show notifications even while the app is minimized

name: Notification Sounds
description: Play a sound when receiving alerts or updates

name: Mentions Only
description: Only notify you when directly mentioned

name: Do Not Disturb
description: Temporarily silence all notifications

name: Activity Status
description: Allow others to see when you are online

name: Usage Analytics
description: Share anonymous usage data to improve the app

name: Friend Requests
description: Allow other users to send friend requests

name: Read Receipts
description: Let others know when you have viewed messages

name: Master Audio
description: Enable all sounds and audio playback

name: Interface Sounds
description: Play clicks and navigation sound effects

name: Background Music
description: Enable ambient music while using the app

name: Spatial Audio
description: Use enhanced directional audio effects

name: Developer Mode
description: Show debugging tools and experimental features

name: Hardware Acceleration
description: Use GPU acceleration for smoother rendering

name: Experimental Features
description: Try unfinished features before public release

name: Verbose Logging
description: Store detailed logs for troubleshooting

name: Peformance Tweaks
description: Enable optimizations that may improve performance at the cost of stability

name: Example Color
description: Choose a custom color for the interface

name: Example Volume
description: Set the master volume level

name: Preferred Type
description: Specify the preferred notification type
